tmpl1.main_image_prompt:
Extremely beautiful fresh-faced girl from 18 to 20 years old, youthful innocent baby face, flawless smooth radiant skin with a natural healthy glow, subtle natural rosy cheeks, refined delicate facial features, bright expressive eyes with long curled lashes, soft glossy natural lips, dreamy gentle expression looking away peacefully, silky shiny voluminous softly wavy hair,

surrounded by oversized blooming flowers such as roses, zinnias, and peonies framing the face, solid powder blue background, soft diffused natural light with a gentle cinematic glow, sheer lace top, pearl drop earrings, coquette fairy romantic aesthetic,

include prominent elements exactly in the custom hex color #{bg_color}, such as large rose accents and petal edges,

ultra realistic detailed skin, subtle film grain, dreamy bokeh, 35mm film shot, masterpiece, 8k, aspect ratio 9:16 portrait.

IMPORTANT:
- The subject’s ethnicity and facial traits should naturally match the language or cultural context of the input prompt.
tmpl1.circle_image_prompt: Still the girl in the Main Image, head and shoulders portrait (passport style framing, shoulders up), casual everyday clothing (modern natural looking streetwear)
tmpl1.tagline_prompt: Generate 1 tagline for an AI portrait feature. STRICT: 1–2 lines only; each line 1-2 words; total max 44 characters; each line max 22 characters; Title Case; no punctuation. STYLE: bold modern premium tech creative. FOCUS: AI portraits beauty realism transformation instant creation. Output only the tagline. No dot, no comma
tmpl1.image_1_prompt: Editorial fashion portrait of a stunning confident young {gender} {country} woman from 25 to 30 years old, flawless glowing skin natural makeup, sharp elegant features, wearing oversized white blazer suit pure cream beige tailored pantsuit high-quality fabric, structured shoulders relaxed fit, blazer fully buttoned or closed with high collar no cleavage visible, modest neckline covered, sitting relaxed on white stone wall or modern sofa against vibrant blue sky or neutral beige textured wall, high bun sleek blonde hair or long wavy auburn hair, round black sunglasses perched on nose, pearl drop earrings gold hoops, natural pose legs crossed or extended casually, hand resting on knee or adjusting blazer sleeve, empowered chic expression looking away thoughtfully or direct gaze, soft natural sunlight golden hour diffused glow strong shadows cinematic contrast, minimalist luxury aesthetic quiet luxury power dressing, clean composition high fashion editorial style, ultra detailed realistic skin texture subtle film grain, shot on 35mm film Canon EOS 5D shallow depth of field, masterpiece 8k trending on Vogue Instagram Pinterest, aspect ratio 9:16
tmpl1.image_2_prompt:
A single woman wearing casual everyday clothing, smiling naturally with a warm and friendly expression, relaxed posture, approachable and confident presence,

upper body to waist visible, full head completely visible with generous space above the head, no part of the head cropped, safe framing, uncropped composition, subject fully inside the frame,

wearing simple casual outfit, natural hair, minimal or no makeup, soft natural lighting, plain clean background,

medium-long shot, camera placed at a comfortable distance, subject occupies about one third of the frame, natural perspective, zoomed out view, not a close up,

ultra realistic, highly detailed, aspect ratio 2:3,

only one person, single subject, no close up, no crop, no head cut off, no zoom, no face cut, no split screen, no collage, no tight framing,

framing priority keep entire head fully visible with extra margin above avoid tight crop

template2.tagline_prompt:
Generate 1 short, catchy marketing tagline for an AI feature that creates portraits from photos.

STRICT REQUIREMENTS:
- MUST be ONLY 3–5 words (no more, no less)
- Title Case formatting
- No punctuation at the end

STYLE:
- Bold, modern, and inspiring tone
- Premium, visually appealing feel
- Tech + creative vibe

FOCUS:
- AI-powered portrait generation
- Beauty, realism, creativity, or transformation
- Instant or effortless creation

GUIDANCE:
- Clear, benefit-focused messaging
- Keep it simple, powerful, and memorable

REFERENCE STYLE (energy only, do NOT copy):
- AI Creates Stunning Portraits
- Restyle Photos With AI Magic
- Transform Ideas Into Beautiful Art

Output ONLY the tagline.
